title: jasione foliosa subsp. mansanetiana
intro: Jasione foliosa subsp. mansanetiana is a subspecies of flowering plant in the bellflower family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Jasione foliosa subsp. mansanetiana include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential anti-cancer and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves and flowers, which can be infused in hot water or used in tinctures and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
